text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Biwa Hayahide wins at Hanshin Racecourse,
the two of us head to a hair salon rumored to be
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So this is the place City was talking about...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's this salon that's super popular right now.
Their slogan is, "A brand new you, starting with
your scalp." It's supposed to be amazing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Scalp cleansing changes your hair at a
fundamental level, they say! Oh... Whoops. It
looks like they moved. Out west, to Kansai...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was shocked when I heard they had moved to
Kansai, but these legs of mine, which carried me
to victory, have also carried me here...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The moment has come—I shall now say goodbye
to my unruly hair. Wait for me here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait for her impatiently, excited to see what
she'll look like after her makeover.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry to have kept you waiting, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I turn around, I'm pulled into a world of
magical fantasy with Biwa Hayahide at its center.
It looks as if she has a halo over her...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd be able to tell how much my hair
quality has improved! It's been tamed on an
atomic level!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That was an extraordinary head spa treatment.
My hair rejoiced with each new pressure point
they massaged on my scalp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Their database utilizes the latest AI technology,
and they used it to create a custom treatment
plan for me! I have the hair of a goddess now!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you had a good time in there!
Sounds like you had a good time in there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, indeed! Words cannot describe just how
thrilled I am. The whole experience felt akin to
victory in a race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go and get some fresh air!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks like a delighted child as she prances
off, but after only a few steps...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what in the world?! Trainer, something's
wrong! My body doesn't feel right!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My joints are so stiff it's as if they're rusted over!
And all I did was break into a light jog!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... This must be because of my hair! It's
become so silky smooth that my mind and body
are out of sync with its reduced air resistance!
choice_data_list:
I guess you'll have to let your hair go back to
the way it was before...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What?! But then I'll have to contend once more
with the unwieldy mess that vexed me for so many
years!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I must construct a plan to resolve this issue. I can
still figure something out before my next
race—it'll just take some all-nighters...
Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We notice someone crying a short distance away.
It's a racer that Biwa Hayahide competed against
earlier today. She's shoving takoyaki into her
tear-stained cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hic! I-I won't lose next time! Just you wait, Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...They told me my hair will go back to the way it
was if I skip a single day of treatment, so I bought
a bulk supply of their product.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Could you hold on to it all for me?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't. With so many rivals, I have neither the
time nor the luxury to be fussing over my hair.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You can give it all back to me once I feel like I've
finally made it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Keep those products safe for me until then,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide smiles, and her cheerful
expression glows as brilliantly as the setting sun!
